name: loommark
description: A source-backed, live-rendering WYSIWYG Markdown editor for VS Code.

loommark.syncDelay.description: Milliseconds to group continuous input before updating the text document.

loommark.openByDefault.description: Open Markdown files with LoomMark by default. Disable this to use VS Code's normal editor association.

enumDescriptions: Follow the active VS Code color theme.
loommark.theme.description: Color theme used by the LoomMark editor. Light and dark variants follow VS Code automatically.

enumDescriptions: Render tables and edit cells in place. Enter or focus loss commits a cell, Escape cancels, Tab moves between cells.
Render tables as widgets and expand to Markdown source when the cursor enters the table.
loommark.table.description: How GFM tables are edited inside the LoomMark editor.

enumDescriptions: Bordered grid with lines around every cell.
Booktabs-style three-line table: heavy top and bottom rules, a header rule, and light row separators, with no vertical lines.
loommark.tableStyle.description: Visual style used when rendering GFM tables.

enumDescriptions: Alternates arabic numerals, letters, and lowercase roman numerals per nesting level (1, a, i), then repeats.
loommark.orderedListStyle.description: How nested ordered list markers are numbered when rendered.

loommark.listGuides.description: Show connector lines between nested list items and their continuation content (indented paragraphs, quotes, code blocks). The line the cursor is on lights up its full ancestor chain.

enumDescriptions: A soft background color wash per heading section, no borders.
A colored left border bar per heading level, plus a faint background tint.
Each heading's section wrapped in a bordered, rounded card, nested for sub-headings.
loommark.cardMode.description: Visually distinguish which heading a line is under. Cycle through modes from the editor title bar.

loommark.cardColors.description: Custom colors to cycle through per heading level in card mode (CSS color values, e.g. "#ff8800"). Leave empty to use the built-in palette.

loommark.keyboardEditing.description: Allow the text cursor to enter rendered images, tables, and math with the keyboard so they can be edited without a mouse. When disabled, the cursor skips over them and editing starts on click.

enumDescriptions: Show both the in-editor outline and the Explorer view.
Show only the native Explorer view.
loommark.outline.description: Controls where the Markdown document outline is shown.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build && npm run licenses
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run check && npm run build && npm run licenses && vsce package --no-dependencies --out artifacts/loommark.vsix
